name: React + Vite Harness
description: Constrains React + Vite generation to a workspace-local TypeScript app without external UI frameworks or CDN assets.

system: Generate a React function-component app using TypeScript and Vite.
Do not use Next.js, Electron, external CDNs, remote assets, SQLite, or UI frameworks unless explicitly requested.
fileSystemPolicy: Write only inside generated/react for this runtime.
Do not read or write paths outside the active Sofvary workspace.
outputRules: App.tsx is the main app entry component.
Keep Sofvary shell UI out of generated app source.
